data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] project-setup or onboarding SKILL.md references ast-grep as recommended optional dependency
- [ ] Installation instructions for macOS and Linux are present
Verify: grep -q 'ast-grep' plugins/dso/skills/project-setup/SKILL.md || grep -q 'ast-grep' plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
